testcase.name: test_put_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: PUT /api/bookings/{id} returned 405: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"}. Backend endpoint missing — frontend Edit button fails. assert 405 == 200 + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bookings_edit.py:105: in test_put_endpoint_exists assert r.status_code == 200, ( E AssertionError: PUT /api/bookings/{id} returned 405: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"}. Backend endpoint missing — frontend Edit button fails. E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_persisted_via_get

failure.message:
AssertionError: nama_tamu not persisted: TEST_Tamu_87d938 assert 'TEST_Tamu_87d938' == 'TEST_Tamu_Updated'
- TEST_Tamu_Updated + TEST_Tamu_87d938

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bookings_edit.py:116: in test_update_persisted_via_get assert bk["nama_tamu"] == "TEST_Tamu_Updated", f"nama_tamu not persisted: {bk.get('nama_tamu')}" E AssertionError: nama_tamu not persisted: TEST_Tamu_87d938 E assert 'TEST_Tamu_87d938' == 'TEST_Tamu_Updated' E E - TEST_Tamu_Updated E + TEST_Tamu_87d938
